_comment: Cordon managed (admin) enforcement — the only truly unoverridable tier. Deploy to: macOS /Library/Application Support/ClaudeCode/managed-settings.json · Linux/WSL /etc/claude-code/managed-settings.json · Windows C:\Program Files\ClaudeCode\managed-settings.json. Deny rules and sandbox booleans here cannot be loosened by project/user settings or CLI flags. Do NOT set allowManagedHooksOnly unless you also ship Cordon's hooks via a managed source — it would silently disable the project-level boundary hook.
